ai_profile:
**Pinkpop 2026 Festival Profile (June 19-21, 2026)**  

Pinkpop 2026 brings an eclectic mix of 32 artists to Landgraaf, Netherlands, showcasing a vibrant blend of genres and styles. Alternative Rock leads the lineup with eight acts, followed by Pop, Indie Rock, and Indie Pop, reflecting the festival’s dedication to modern, genre-spanning music. With artists also delving into Punk Rock, Electropop, and even niche styles like Gothic Rock and Rave Rock, Pinkpop continues to offer something for everyone.  

This year’s lineup is truly international, with acts hailing from the United Kingdom and the United States (9 each), the Netherlands (7), and other countries like Germany, Canada, and Australia. Gender representation highlights a male-dominated lineup (20 male-led acts), but female (8) and mixed-gender (4) groups contribute to a more diverse roster. However, representation of artists of color remains low, with only one act identifying as such, highlighting opportunities for broader inclusivity in the future.  

With all acts rated by festival-goers and an average score of 6.88, Pinkpop 2026 promises a solid mix of crowd-pleasers and rising stars. Notably, all artists are connected to Spotify, ensuring attendees can explore the lineup ahead of time. As always, Pinkpop continues to celebrate its legacy of blending iconic names with fresh talent, creating an unforgettable summer music experience.
